U.S. permit directory

Permit pages organized by state and jurisdiction.

PermitPulse generates this directory from the current shared jurisdiction catalog. Use it to find covered state pages, city permit portals, live-data support levels, and the right path into Mission Control.

Open Mission Control Open California permit search
24 State pages
58 Covered jurisdictions
8 Live-data jurisdictions
Top covered states

Start with the states that have the most coverage

These states currently have the largest number of covered jurisdictions in the PermitPulse catalog.

State pages

Browse coverage by state

Every state page lists the covered jurisdictions currently available in the shared PermitPulse catalog, with links into each city or county permit page.

Portal-only

Arizona

2 covered jurisdictions. 0 are live-data supported and 2 are portal-only based on the current PermitPulse catalog.

Featured city pages

Jump directly into covered city permit pages

These links come directly from current catalog coverage and give crawlers a shorter path into the city layer.
